# System tray + always-running daemon

| Field        | Value                    |
|-------------|--------------------------|
| Phase       | P5: Polish               |
| Priority    | Should have              |
| Status      | Not started              |
| Est. Effort | Small (1-2h)             |
| Dependencies| Core loop working        |

## Description

Tauri system tray icon. Launch at login. Show current task + time in tray tooltip. Quick access to today's log.
